title: The rent
doc_html:
SECTION 2.  THE RENT

Art. 2675.  The rent

The rent may consist of money, commodities, fruits, services, or other performanc­es sufficient to support an onerous contract.

Acts 2004, No. 821, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2005.
